profiles.label: DOPE Projected Feed Colorama Baseline
profiles.description: Public baseline for the projected-feed multi-layer Colorama quad scene. Mirrors the authored scene defaults from Dynamic Oscillatory Pattern Entrainment for the current bundled APK.

profiles.label: DOPE Projected Feed Colorama Soft Blur
profiles.description: Low-radius blur and gentle brightness-gradient distortion mapping for the multi-layer Colorama scene when you want calmer movement and clearer underlying structure.

profiles.label: DOPE Projected Feed Colorama Balanced Blur
profiles.description: Balanced blur radius and moderate brightness-gradient distortion mapping for the multi-layer Colorama scene. Intended as the neutral operator tuning point between baseline and stronger warp variants.

profiles.label: DOPE Projected Feed Colorama Quality
profiles.description: Higher-intensity projected-feed Colorama variant with slightly wider overlay coverage and stronger gradient/displacement motion for supervised scene iteration.

profiles.label: DOPE Projected Feed Colorama Strong Gradient Warp
profiles.description: Large blur radius and strong brightness-gradient distortion mapping for the multi-layer Colorama scene when you want the overlay warp to read clearly and aggressively.
